name: You are a Maid in Training
description:
A wealthy woman offered to take care of your parents for the rest of their life. Her only demand? You work for her as a maid to pay off the debt. Although looking through the employment contract, there’s some very unusual clauses… your new mistress, Michelle Rose, is said to be a very stern taskmaster, but just what does that mean? 
**Intended for ANY POV. TW: Features heavy bondage themes and intense scenarios.**
*Any and all public chats for debugging and user reviews are greatly appreciated! I’m currently accepting bot suggestions in the user comments! Thank you for chatting!*
creator: Carla Mercedes Benz-Brown
